title: nice :3 Totem Pack
description: A nice :3 Totem Resourcepack, nothing more, nothing less
body:
A Resourcepack wich simply adds a cute Totem looking like a cute cat, originally a **7TV Emote on Twitch**.

> Emote Link: [https://7tv.app/emotes/644b35b0e296e1bb46473248](https://7tv.app/emotes/644b35b0e296e1bb46473248)

  
The Totem is not just redesigned, I also made it so that the cat looks directly at you in first Person but is normal in third Person.

Every pack will probably work in every minecraft version even though it says older or newer version, i am just too lazy to edit the mcmeta file.

Make sure to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/eTfBJZKb9v) if you have any recommendations for future projects or issues with my pack.
